faq.title: Questions? We've Got Answers
faq.a1: Pro includes 10+ carefully designed advanced style templates, 6 industry Landing Page templates, each with complete design system prompts. You also get all future updates and priority support.
faq.q2: How do I use Pro styles after purchase?
faq.a2: After purchase, log in to your account and you'll see all Pro styles in the style library. Each Pro style has a dedicated label and you can copy the complete prompts directly.
faq.a3: Under Taiwan's Consumer Protection Act Article 19, digital products are exempt from the 7-day return policy. For technical issues like checkout errors or duplicate charges, please contact support and we'll process refunds via PayUNi.
faq.q4: Will there be more Pro styles in the future?
faq.a4: Yes! We continuously add more advanced styles. All Pro users get all future updates for free, no additional payment required.
faq.q5: Can Pro styles be used commercially?
faq.a5: Yes. The Pro license includes commercial use rights. You can use the generated designs for commercial projects.

footer.description: Design system library built for AI-powered design.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1: Welcome to StylePrompts ("the Service"). We are a professional digital platform dedicated to providing high-quality AI design style prompts for designers, developers, and creators. Our Pro version includes carefully crafted advanced style templates, various industry Landing Page Templates, and comprehensive design system prompts to help you create professional-grade user interfaces.
terms.s2: Full access to our service requires account registration. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. We recommend using a strong password and keeping your account information secure. If you discover any unauthorized use or security breach, please notify us immediately through our support email, and we will assist you promptly.
terms.s3: The Pro version is a one-time purchase with lifetime access. All payments are securely processed through PayUNi, a trusted Taiwan-based payment platform supporting VISA, MasterCard, JCB, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We do not directly access or store your credit card information. Upon successful payment, your Pro access will be activated within minutes, giving you full access to all Pro-exclusive features and content.
terms.s4: Upon purchasing Pro, you receive a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use our design resources for your personal and commercial projects. You may freely use these resources to create websites, applications, or other digital products. However, you may not directly resell, redistribute, publicly share, or sell Pro content as a standalone product. Violation of license terms may result in account termination.
terms.s5: All content provided by this Service, including but not limited to design style templates, prompt copy, visual assets, and related documentation, is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. While the works you create using our Service belong to you, the intellectual property rights of the original templates and prompts remain with StylePrompts.
terms.s6: This Service is provided "as is." While we strive to ensure stable and reliable service, we do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or complete error-free performance. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this Service. AI-generated results may vary due to multiple factors, and we recommend reviewing and adjusting output before production use.
terms.s7: We are committed to continuously improving our Service and reserve the right to modify, update, or adjust service content at any time. For significant changes, we will notify users in advance via email or website announcement. In extreme circumstances, we may need to suspend or terminate the Service, in which case we will provide reasonable notice. Purchased Pro access remains valid for the duration of normal service operation.
terms.s8: We value every user's feedback and needs. If you have any questions about these Terms of Service or encounter any issues while using our Service, please feel free to contact us via email: support@styleprompts.com. Our customer support team will respond to your inquiry within 1-2 business days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: StylePrompts takes your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. If you have any questions about this policy, please feel free to contact us.
privacy.s1: The information we collect includes: (1) Account Information: the email address and optional display name you provide during registration; (2) Payment Information: processed through PayUNi, we only receive transaction confirmations and do not directly store your credit card numbers; (3) Usage Information: basic data about your interactions with the Service, such as login times and features used, to improve service quality.
privacy.s2: Your information is used for the following purposes: providing and maintaining normal service operation; verifying your account identity and purchase rights; sending important service notifications and updates; processing your payments and responding to support requests; analyzing usage patterns to continuously improve our products and services. We will not use your personal information for purposes not stated in this policy.
privacy.s3: We only share minimal necessary information with the following trusted third-party services: PayUNi (payment processing) and Supabase (database and authentication services). These partners are bound by strict data protection agreements. Except as required by law, we do not sell, trade, or transfer your personally identifiable information to any other third parties.
privacy.s4: This Service uses essential technical cookies to maintain your login status and provide basic functionality. These cookies are used solely for essential service operation and are not used for advertising tracking or cross-site behavioral analysis. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings, but disabling essential cookies may affect normal service use.
privacy.s5: We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your information: all data transmission uses SSL/TLS encryption; passwords are stored using secure hashing; payments are securely processed by PCI DSS-compliant PayUNi; we regularly review and update security measures. While we do our best to protect your data, please understand that no internet transmission can be guaranteed 100% secure.
privacy.s6: Under applicable privacy regulations, you have the following rights regarding your personal information: the right to access and obtain a copy of your personal data; the right to correct inaccurate information; the right to request data deletion in certain circumstances; the right to object to or restrict certain data processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at support@styleprompts.com, and we will respond to your request within 30 days.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your StylePrompts Pro purchase. Please read our refund policy carefully before making a purchase.
refund.s1: StylePrompts Pro is a digital product, and upon purchase, you gain immediate access to all Pro-exclusive content. Under Taiwan's Consumer Protection Act Article 19 and the Executive Yuan's 'Reasonable Exceptions for Rescission Rights in Distance Sales,' digital content not provided via physical media and online services completed immediately upon provision—with the consumer's prior consent—are exempt from the 7-day unconditional return right. As this service is digital content and you agree to immediate access upon purchase, purchases are generally non-refundable. We recommend thoroughly exploring our free content before purchasing to ensure our Service meets your needs.
refund.s2: We understand that special circumstances may occur. If you encounter any of the following situations, we will do our best to assist with a refund: duplicate charges due to technical errors during checkout; successful payment but Pro access not properly activated despite technical support efforts; other issues clearly attributable to our end. Please contact us within 7 days of discovering the issue.
refund.s3: To request a refund, please email support@styleprompts.com with the following information: your registered email address, purchase date, payment amount, and a detailed description of the issue. Our customer support team will review your request within 2 business days. Approved refunds will be processed through PayUNi to your original payment method, typically within 5-10 business days.
refund.s4: If you have any questions about purchases or refunds, please feel free to contact us. Our support email: support@styleprompts.com. We are committed to handling every user's concerns with sincerity and professionalism, striving to ensure every customer has a positive experience. Thank you for choosing StylePrompts Pro.

faq.a3: Pro provides 100 advanced visual styles, exclusive style updates, and priority support with new features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We value your privacy. StylePrompts is a purely frontend visual style library.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.desc: StylePrompts does not collect any personal data. All operations are performed locally in your browser. We do not track your usage behavior or store your generated prompts.

ownership.title: Prompt Ownership
ownership.desc: All prompts you generate and copy from this site are entirely yours. You can use them freely in any AI tool without attribution.

security.title: Data Security
security.desc: Since we do not transmit or store any user data to servers, there is no risk of data breach. Your browser preferences are stored only in LocalStorage.

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.desc: This site only uses essential technical cookies for basic functionality (such as language preferences). We do not use any tracking or advertising cookies.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Welcome to StylePrompts visual style library. By using this site, you agree to the following terms.

acceptance.title: Service Nature
acceptance.desc: StylePrompts is a free visual style prompt library, providing pre-designed UI style prompts for you to copy and use. This site does not provide AI generation services, only prompt content.

account.title: License Scope
account.desc: The visual style prompts provided on this site are freely licensed. You may use the generated prompts for personal or commercial projects without payment or attribution. However, style preview images are for reference only and not licensed for redistribution.

usage.title: Fair Use
usage.desc: You agree not to: (1) scrape or auto-download site content in bulk; (2) repackage site content as a competing service; (3) remove or alter copyright notices on this site.

changes.title: Content Updates
changes.desc: We continuously update the visual style library, add new styles, and optimize prompt content. Some base styles are permanently free, while advanced styles may require upgrading to Pro.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.desc: Prompts on this site are suggestions only. The final results of AI generation depend on your AI tool and model. We make no guarantees regarding the quality or suitability of AI-generated content.

coffee.title: Buy Me a Coffee
coffee.subtitle: If StylePrompts has been helpful to you, consider buying me a coffee to support the continued development of this project!
coffee.ctaDesc: Your support is the biggest motivation for me to continue developing and maintaining this project. Every coffee represents your recognition and encouragement!

reason1.title: Indie Developer
reason1.desc: This is a project built by an indie developer. Your support helps me focus on creating better tools.

reason2.title: Continuous Updates
reason2.desc: Your sponsorship helps me keep updating the visual style library with more curated design styles.

reason3.title: Keep It Free
reason3.desc: Your support helps keep the core features free, so more people can benefit from this tool.

coffee.thanks: Thank you to every supporter. Your encouragement keeps this project growing 💜
